company_name: Hyundai AutoEver India Pvt Ltd ( the IT Group Company of HYUNDAI & KIA Motor Group.)
job_location: 1) Chennai 2) Gurugram 3) Anantapur 4) Pune 5) Hyderabad Note : · During Internship Training Location 3 to 4 months will be Chennai · Students will be posted to respective work locations based on positions availability. · Students should be willing to work in any Technology (ABAP, JAVA or any other emerging technologies based on business requirement).
date_of_joining: Feb 2026 (Students can avail leaves for examination and it should be preplanned one based on communication from the University)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship : 30 K to 40 K per month Salary after 6 months Internship (If PPO given) : CTC 7,50,000 ~ 8,70,000 (CTC Comprises Gross, Statutory & 4% Variable)
package_salary.bond: 3 years (including the internship period) Only training Cost, which will be approximate Rs.5.0 lakhs is the compensation amount
